gui.menu.analysis.corrupted_jar_finder.d: Scans every mod JAR (including nested jars), Minecraft libs to detect empty or corrupted archives that the game cannot load.
gui.comment_under_title:
Paste the message generated by the #1 button bellow in $CONFIG.text.support_place$.

If you can, please share more about how the crash happened.
gui.request_help_button: #2: THEN CLICK HERE to go to $CONFIG.text.support_name$
warnings.piracy: You are using an unsupported launcher or offline mode. If you need help with this crash, please try installing a supported launcher (like $LINK.PRISM$) or switching to online mode, then repeating the actions that led to the crash. $HELP_NAME$ community do not provide support for crashes that happen in offline mode.
warnings.curseforge_corrupted: We detected signs in $LOG_FILENAME$ that your Minecraft installation is corrupted. To fix this, you have a couple of options: 1.1 - Press the $LANG.gui.analysis.find_corrupted_installation_jar$ button below. 1.2 - If it finds any corrupted JARs, remove them. 2.1 - If the first solution doesn't help, press the $LANG.gui.analysis.show_install_folder$ button below. 2.2 - Remove the Install folder.
gui.comment_under_title_pls_report: To report the problem or get help, please join $CONFIG.text.support_name$.
gui.upload_all_button: #1: CLICK HERE to prepare info to help us
gui.analysis.corrupted_jar_finder.header:
Scans every mod JAR (including nested jars), Minecraft libs and reports archives that are empty or corrupted.
Use it when the game fails to load certain mods or silently ignores them.
Also can be useful in case of corrupted MC installation.
